# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-016](task-0083): Provider Error Handling

## Purpose

Implement provider error handling.

## Scope

- Error types
- Handling logic
- Recovery

## Implementation

1. Define error types
2. Implement handling
3. Add recovery

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Error types defined
2. Handling works
3. Recovery works
